ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_records" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "fiscal_period" INTEGER /* Fiscal period ID */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year number */,
  "country_group" INTEGER /* Group ID of countries */,
  "awc_and_comp" TEXT /* AWC and competitor identifier */,
  "varietal" INTEGER /* Type of wine varietal */,
  "brand" INTEGER /* Brand of the wine */,
  "channel" INTEGER /* Channel through which the wine was sold */,
  "unit_size" INTEGER /* Size of the unit sold */,
  "cases_sold" INTEGER /* Number of cases sold */,
  "price_per_unit" TEXT /* Price per unit of the wine */,
  "total_sale_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_brand FOREIGN KEY ("brand") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_fiscal_period FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_period") REFERENCES fiscal_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_unit_size FOREIGN KEY ("unit_size") REFERENCES unit_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_channel FOREIGN KEY ("channel") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_country_group FOREIGN KEY ("country_group") REFERENCES country_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_records_varietal FOREIGN KEY ("varietal") REFERENCES varietals ("varietal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region */,
  "region_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region manager */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "average_income" TEXT /* Average income in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_region_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal period */,
  "period_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the fiscal period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the fiscal period */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year associated with the period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fiscal period (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the country group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country group */,
  "group_code" TEXT /* Code for the country group */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the country group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_groups_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine brand */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer of the wine brand */,
  "brand_code" TEXT /* Code for the brand */,
  "brand_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand manager */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brands_brand_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "varietals" (
  "varietal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each varietal */,
  "varietal_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine varietal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine varietal */,
  "varietal_code" TEXT /* Code for the varietal */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the varietal */,
  "alcohol_content" TEXT /* Typical alcohol content of the varietal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("varietal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "channel_code" TEXT /* Code for the sales channel */,
  "channel_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the channel manager */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_channels_channel_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit size */,
  "size_value" INTEGER /* Value of the unit size in milliliters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit size */,
  "unit_code" TEXT /* Code for the unit size */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., bottle, box) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales rep, manager, analyst) */,
  "user_code" TEXT /* Code for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales_records ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
